description: The Camera Permissions component allows you to set up who can use certain camera modes on the streaming camera. Currently, the component allows setting permissions for camera modes per role.

fields.CameraModeFilterMode: Whether to allow or disallow the ``CameraModes``
fields.CameraModes: List of Camera modes which decide how a stream camera can look at users and/or the world.
fields.AllowFramingOtherUsers: Determines whether focusing the camera on other user is allowed.

usage: First, add an item to the list of camera modes, and select a role at the bottom. Then, use ``CameraModeFilterMode`` to determine if users can use any of the items in the list of camera modes.
